entries.stdout: Project initialized successfully in ./stripe-projects-feeedback-codex after browser authentication and confirmation.
entries.reasoning_summary: Initialization completed once the authenticated Stripe session was available.

entries.stdout: Provisioned successfully on the free Railway plan and synced credentials into project .env and vault.
entries.reasoning_summary: Database was a core requirement and Railway provided the fastest successful provisioning path.

entries.stdout: Provisioned successfully and synced POSTHOG credentials.
entries.reasoning_summary: Analytics was optional but useful, and PostHog completed without extra manual account work.

entries.stdout: Failed: provider requested additional verification at vercel.com.
entries.reasoning_summary: Vercel is a good compute target, but the provider-side verification requirement blocks automated provisioning for now.

entries.stdout: Linked provider account; provisioning paused pending payment method / spend limit confirmation for this paid service.
entries.reasoning_summary: Chroma matched the requested vector category, but the live catalog pricing makes billing confirmation mandatory.

decisions: Switch compute provisioning attempt from Railway hosting to Vercel because Railway hosting needed a repo/image source during setup.
Keep the local app implementation independent from cloud provisioning status so the product remains deliverable while provider setup continues.
Prepare a focused commit now that includes app code, session logs, and Stripe Projects initialization artifacts.
